title: 中国的OpenClaw热潮是人工智能公司的淘金热
content: 围绕开源代理的炒作正在促使人们租用云服务器并购买人工智能订阅只是为了尝试一下，这为科技公司创造了意外之财。
original_title: China’s OpenClaw Boom Is a Gold Rush for AI Companies
original_content: Hype around the open source agent is driving people to rent cloud servers and buy AI subscriptions just to try it, creating a windfall for tech companies.

title: 为什么沃尔玛和 OpenAI 正在改变他们的代理购物交易
content: 在 OpenAI 的即时结帐功能出现缺陷后，沃尔玛将其 Sparky 聊天机器人直接嵌入 ChatGPT 和 Google Gemini 中。
original_title: Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal
original_content: After OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature fell short, Walmart is instead embedding its Sparky chatbot directly into ChatGPT and Google Gemini.

title: 微软聘请红杉资本支持的人工智能协作平台Cove团队
content: 人工智能协作初创公司 Cove 在其团队加入微软后即将关闭，服务将于 4 月 1 日结束，客户数据集将被删除。
original_title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
original_content: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.
